ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal – Action Required
ham.body:
Hello Alex,

We hope you’re enjoying our services.

This is a reminder that your subscription to ProSuite will renew automatically on July 15, 2026. Your current plan (Premium) will continue with the same features and pricing.

To review the renewal details or change your plan, please visit <URL>.

If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email or contact our support team.

Thank you for choosing ProSuite!

Best regards,
The ProSuite Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – IT Helpdesk Ticket #4821
spam.body:
Dear Valued User,

A support ticket has been opened on your account (Ticket ID: 4821) due to a security incident. Our system detected unusual login activity from an unrecognized device.

To resolve this issue and prevent potential service interruption, please verify your credentials by clicking the link below:

<URL>

You will be prompted to enter your username and password. This step is mandatory to restore full access to your services.

Failure to comply within 24 hours may result in temporary suspension of your account.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
IT Support Team
Customer Success Division
